user.title: Connect to Overseerr
user.description: Enter your Overseerr server details. Your API key can be found in Overseerr under **Settings → General**.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Please verify the URL and that Overseerr is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your Overseerr settings.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

request_media.name: Request Media
request_media.description: Request a movie or TV show in Overseerr by TMDB ID.

media_type.name: Media Type
media_type.description: Type of media to request: 'movie' or 'tv'.

media_id.name: Media ID
media_id.description: The TMDB ID of the movie or TV show to request.

search.name: Search Media
search.description: Search for movies and TV shows. Fires an overseerr_search_results event with the results.

query.name: Search Query
query.description: The search terms to look up.
